education.field_of_study: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

custom_answers.Why are you interested in this role?: With 9 years of enterprise Power Platform experience at RBC, Boeing, WSECU, and AT&T, I am passionate about delivering scalable, compliant solutions that drive digital transformation. This role aligns perfectly with my expertise in Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, and Azure integrations.
custom_answers.What makes you a good fit?: I bring 9 years of hands-on Power Platform experience across banking, aerospace, and telecommunications. I specialize in Model-Driven Apps, Canvas Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse architecture, and CI/CD via Azure DevOps in regulated enterprise environments.
custom_answers.Describe a challenging project: At RBC/City National Bank, I architected a GRC compliance system on Power Platform handling governance, risk, and compliance workflows for regulated banking operations. This involved complex Dataverse data models, automated approval chains, Azure API integrations, and strict security requirements.
